admin_enabled.description: Specifies whether the interconnect attachment is enabled for use. Must be true or false.

bandwidth.description: Specifies the capacity of the interconnect attachment, must be one of the allowed bandwidth tiers (e.g., BPS_50M, BPS_100M, etc.).

candidate_subnets.description: Specifies the subnets from which Cloud Router allocates IP addresses for the interconnect attachment; must belong to the same region as the attachment.

description.description: Specifies a description for the interconnect attachment, providing details about its purpose or usage.

edge_availability_domain.description: Specifies the availability domain for the interconnect attachment, either "AVAILABILITY_DOMAIN_1" or "AVAILABILITY_DOMAIN_2", to determine edge location preferences.

encryption.description: Specifies whether the interconnect attachment uses encryption, with options being 'NONE' or 'IPSEC'.

interconnect.description: Specifies the name of the interconnect to associate with the attachment; must be an existing interconnect in the same project and region.

ipsec_internal_addresses.description: Defines the internal IP addresses used for the IPSec tunnel configuration, must be in the same region as the interconnect attachment and belong to a valid subnet.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the attachment, must be a set of strings or integers.

mtu.description: Specifies the maximum transmission unit (MTU) size for the interconnect attachment, measured in bytes. Must be a valid MTU value supported by the interconnect.

name.description: Unique identifier for the interconnect attachment; must be compliant with naming conventions.

router.description: Specifies the Cloud Router used for dynamic routing, required for creating the interconnect attachment.

stack_type.description: Specifies the stack type for the interconnect attachment; must be either 'IPV4_ONLY' or 'IPV4_IPV6'.

subnet_length.description: Length of the subnet prefix used for the interconnect attachment, defining the range of IP addresses allocated.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout configuration for operations on the interconnect attachment, including create, update, and delete actions.

type.description: Specifies the type of interconnect attachment, either 'PARTNER' for connections through a partner or 'DEDICATED' for direct connections.

vlan_tag8021q.description: Specifies the VLAN tag for the interconnect attachment, must be an integer between 2 and 4094 or 0 for untagged.
